fields.label: Active Sender
fields.description: Sender ID to use for outgoing email (smtp, mailchimp, …)

fields.label: From Address
fields.description: Default From address for all outgoing emails

fields.label: From Name
fields.description: Display name shown in the From field

fields.label: Log Email Sends
fields.description: Write a log entry for every email dispatched

fields.label: SMTP Host
fields.description: SMTP server hostname (use 'mailpit' for local dev)

fields.label: Use STARTTLS
fields.description: Upgrade connection with STARTTLS (disable for Mailpit)

fields.label: Username
fields.description: SMTP auth username (leave blank if no auth required)
